lines.gurmukhi: ਆਤਮ ਰਤੰ ਸੰਸਾਰ ਗਹੰ ਤੇ ਨਰ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਿਹਫਲਹ ॥੬੫॥
lines.translit: aatam ratan sansaar gahan te nar naanak nihafalah |65|
lines.english: Those whose souls are imbued with the world - O Nanak, their lives are fruitless. ||65||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮਣਹ ਸੰਗਿ ਉਧਰਣੰ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਕਰਮ ਜਿ ਪੂਰਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: brahamanah sang udharanan braham karam ji pooranah |
lines.english: Associating with the Brahmin, one is saved, if his actions are perfect and God-like.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰ ਦਰਬ ਹਿਰਣੰ ਬਹੁ ਵਿਘਨ ਕਰਣੰ ਉਚਰਣੰ ਸਰਬ ਜੀਅ ਕਹ ॥
lines.translit: par darab hiranan bahu vighan karanan ucharanan sarab jeea kah |
lines.english: The mortal steals the wealth of others, and makes all sorts of problems; his preaching is only for his own livelihood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਉ ਲਈ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਅਤਿਪਤਿ ਮਨ ਮਾਏ ਕਰਮ ਕਰਤ ਸਿ ਸੂਕਰਹ ॥੬੬॥
lines.translit: lau lee trisanaa atipat man maae karam karat si sookarah |66|
lines.english: His desire for this and that is not satisfied; his mind is caught in Maya, and he is acting like a pig. ||66||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤੇ ਸਮੇਵ ਚਰਣੰ ਉਧਰਣੰ ਭੈ ਦੁਤਰਹ ॥
lines.translit: mate samev charanan udharanan bhai dutarah |
lines.english: Those who are intoxicated and absorbed in the Lord's Lotus Feet are saved from the terrifying world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨੇਕ ਪਾਤਿਕ ਹਰਣੰ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗਮ ਨ ਸੰਸਯਹ ॥੬੭॥੪॥
lines.translit: anek paatik haranan naanak saadh sangam na sansayah |67|4|
lines.english: Countless sins are destroyed, O Nanak, in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy; there is no doubt about this. ||67||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਗਾਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 5 gaathaa |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl, Gaat'haa:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਜਾ ਰੁਧਿਰ ਦ੍ਰੁਗੰਧਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਅਥਿ ਗਰਬੇਣ ਅਗੵਾਨਣੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: majaa rudhir drugandhaa naanak ath garaben agayaanano |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the ignorant one is proud of his foul-smelling marrow, blood and bones. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਪੂਰ ਪੁਹਪ ਸੁਗੰਧਾ ਪਰਸ ਮਾਨੁਖੵ ਦੇਹੰ ਮਲੀਣੰ ॥
lines.translit: karapoor puhap sugandhaa paras maanukhay dehan maleenan |
lines.english: Camphor, flowers and perfume become contaminated, by coming into contact with the human body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਛੇਣ ਨੈਣ ਭਾਰੇਣ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਿਨਾ ਸਾਧੂ ਨ ਸਿਧੵਤੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gachhen nain bhaaren naanak binaa saadhoo na sidhayate |2|
lines.english: Worlds and realms in the blink of an eye, O Nanak, without the Holy Saint, he shall not be saved. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਮਾਣੋ ਪਰਜੰਤ ਆਕਾਸਹ ਦੀਪ ਲੋਅ ਸਿਖੰਡਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: paramaano parajant aakaasah deep loa sikhanddanah |
lines.english: Even if the mortal could reduce himself to the size of an atom, and shoot through the ethers,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਣੋ ਸਤਿ ਹੋਵੰਤੋ ਮਰਣੋ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟੇਣ ਮਿਥਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jaano sat hovanto marano drisatten mithiaa |
lines.english: Know for sure that death will come; whatever is seen is false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਰਤਿ ਸਾਥਿ ਚਲੰਥੋ ਭਣੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗੇਣ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: keerat saath chalantho bhanant naanak saadh sangen |3|
lines.english: So chant the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy; this alone shall go along with you in the end. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਯਾ ਚਿਤ ਭਰਮੇਣ ਇਸਟ ਮਿਤ੍ਰੇਖੁ ਬਾਂਧਵਹ ॥
lines.translit: maayaa chit bharamen isatt mitrekh baandhavah |
lines.english: The consciousness wanders lost in Maya, attached to friends and relatives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਬਧੵੰ ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗੇਣ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਖ ਅਸਥਾਨੰ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਭਜਣੰ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: labadhayan saadh sangen naanak sukh asathaanan gopaal bhajanan |4|
lines.english: Vibrating and meditating on the Lord of the Universe in the Saadh Sangat, O Nanak, the eternal place of rest is found. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਕਟਿ ਬਸੰਤੋ ਬਾਂਸੋ ਨਾਨਕ ਅਹੰ ਬੁਧਿ ਨ ਬੋਹਤੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: nikatt basanto baanso naanak ahan budh na bohate |5|
lines.english: But the bamboo tree, also growing near it, does not pick up its fragrance; it is too tall and proud. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈਲਾਗਰ ਸੰਗੇਣ ਨਿੰਮੁ ਬਿਰਖ ਸਿ ਚੰਦਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: mailaagar sangen ninm birakh si chandanah |
lines.english: The lowly nim tree, growing near the sandalwood tree, becomes just like the sandalwood tree.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਤੰ ਪੰਚ ਸਤ੍ਰੇਣ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਬਾਣੇ ਪ੍ਰਹਾਰਣਹ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: hatan panch satren naanak har baane prahaaranah |6|
lines.english: The five enemies are killed, O Nanak, by shooting the Arrow of the Lord. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਥਾ ਗੁੰਫ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਕਥੰ ਮਥੰ ਮਾਨ ਮਰਦਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: gaathaa gunf gopaal kathan mathan maan maradanah |
lines.english: In this Gaat'haa, the Lord's Sermon is woven; listening to it, pride is crushed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਚਨ ਸਾਧ ਸੁਖ ਪੰਥਾ ਲਹੰਥਾ ਬਡ ਕਰਮਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: bachan saadh sukh panthaa lahanthaa badd karamanah |
lines.english: The Words of the Holy are the path of peace. They are obtained by good karma.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਹੰਤਾ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣੇਨ ਰਮਣੰ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਨਹ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: rahantaa janam maranen ramanan naanak har keeratanah |7|
lines.english: The cycle of birth and death is ended, O Nanak, singing the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਬਿਹੂਣ ਬਿਖਮਤਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਹੰਤਿ ਜੋਨਿ ਬਾਸਰੋ ਰੈਣੀ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: naam bihoon bikhamataa naanak bahant jon baasaro rainee |8|
lines.english: Without the Naam, the Name of the Lord, O Nanak, there is misery and suffering. The mortal wanders in reincarnation day and night. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤ੍ਰ ਭੁਰਿਜੇਣ ਝੜੀਯੰ ਨਹ ਜੜੀਅੰ ਪੇਡ ਸੰਪਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: patr bhurijen jharreeyan neh jarreean pedd sanpataa |
lines.english: When the leaves wither and fall, they cannot be attached to the branch again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਗੁਣ ਰਮਣੰ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੰਸਾਰ ਸਾਗਰ ਨਹ ਬਿਆਪਣਹ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: har naam gun ramanan naanak sansaar saagar neh biaapanah |9|
lines.english: Whoever sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord's Name, O Nanak, is not affected by the world-ocean. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਵਨੀ ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗੇਣ ਲਭੰਤੰ ਬਡ ਭਾਗਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: bhaavanee saadh sangen labhantan badd bhaaganah |
lines.english: One is blessed with love for the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, by great good fortune.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਥਾ ਗੂੜ ਅਪਾਰੰ ਸਮਝਣੰ ਬਿਰਲਾ ਜਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: gaathaa goorr apaaran samajhanan biralaa janah |
lines.english: This Gaat'haa is profound and infinite; how rare are those who understand it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਸਾਰ ਕਾਮ ਤਜਣੰ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਰਮਣੰ ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗਮਹ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: sansaar kaam tajanan naanak gobind ramanan saadh sangamah |10|
lines.english: They forsake sexual desire and worldly love, O Nanak, and praise the Lord in the Saadh Sangat. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਮੰਤ੍ਰ ਸਾਧ ਬਚਨਾ ਕੋਟਿ ਦੋਖ ਬਿਨਾਸਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: sumantr saadh bachanaa kott dokh binaasanah |
lines.english: The Words of the Holy are the most sublime Mantra. They eradicate millions of sinful mistakes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਚਰਣ ਕਮਲ ਧੵਾਨੰ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੁਲ ਸਮੂਹ ਉਧਾਰਣਹ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: har charan kamal dhayaanan naanak kul samooh udhaaranah |11|
lines.english: Meditating on the Lotus Feet of the Lord, O Nanak, all one's generations are saved. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਕਤੇ ਰਮਣ ਗੋਬਿੰਦਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਲਬਧੵੰ ਬਡ ਭਾਗਣਹ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: mukate raman gobindah naanak labadhayan badd bhaaganah |12|
lines.english: Those who dwell on the Lord of the Universe are liberated. O Nanak, only the most fortunate are so blessed. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁੰਦਰ ਮੰਦਰ ਸੈਣਹ ਜੇਣ ਮਧੵ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: sundar mandar sainah jen madhay har keeratanah |
lines.english: That palace is beautiful, in which the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises are sung.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਲਬਧੋ ਮਿਤ੍ਰ ਸੁਮਿਤੋ ॥
lines.translit: har labadho mitr sumito |
lines.english: I have found the Lord, my Friend, my very Best Friend.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਾ ਅਸਥਲੁ ਤੋਲੁ ਅਮਿਤੋ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kaa asathal tol amito |
lines.english: His dwelling is eternal; His weight cannot be weighed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਦਾਰਣ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਚਿਤੋ ॥
lines.translit: bidaaran kade na chito |
lines.english: He shall never break my heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਜਸੰ ਮਿਟੰਤ ਸਤ ਪੁਤ੍ਰਹ ॥ ਸਿਮਰਤਬੵ ਰਿਦੈ ਗੁਰ ਮੰਤ੍ਰਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: apajasan mittant sat putrah | simaratabay ridai gur mantranah |
lines.english: One's bad reputation is erased by a true son, Who meditates in his heart on the Guru's Mantra.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋੁਈ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਖਾ ਜੀਅ ਸੰਗਿ ਕਿਤੋ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: souee naanak sakhaa jeea sang kito |13|
lines.english: Nanak has made Him the Friend of his soul. ||13||
